query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS playerAvatars (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  memberId INT NOT NULL,
  characterId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'custom',
  skinTone VARCHAR(20),
  hairStyle VARCHAR(50),
  hairColor VARCHAR(20),
  clothingColor VARCHAR(20),
  accessory VARCHAR(50),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_member_avatar (memberId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gameErrorReports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  memberId INT NOT NULL,
  classId INT NOT NULL,
  questId INT,
  reportType ENUM('error', 'doubt', 'suggestion') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'error',
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'reviewed', 'resolved', 'dismissed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  teacherResponse TEXT,
  resolvedBy INT,
  resolvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
